About.title: Adowise: The Ultimate SaaS & Business Solution
About.paragraph: Adowise is designed to help startups, SaaS companies, and businesses deliver high-quality products with speed and efficiency. Everything you need to build and scale your online platform is included, backed by modern technology and developer-friendly tools.

Blog.title: Latest Trends & Insights
Blog.subtitle: Stay updated with the latest in Agentic AI, Sora, SpaceX Starship, and more.

Pricing.subtitle: Choose the best plan to scale your business.
Pricing.basic_desc: Up to 5 pages for startups and local businesses.
Pricing.business_desc: For growing businesses that need custom solutions.
Pricing.custom_desc: Fully customized application tailored to your needs.

Contact.title: Need Help? Open a Ticket
Contact.subtitle: Our support team will get back to you ASAP via email.

AboutTwo.content1: Every component and feature in Adowise is built with clean, maintainable code. Reduce errors, improve performance, and ship faster without headaches.
AboutTwo.content2: Our dedicated support team ensures you have answers whenever you need them. From setup to scaling, we've got you covered.
AboutTwo.content3: Leveraging the power of React and Next.js, Adowise delivers lightning-fast performance, SEO-friendly pages, and a scalable architecture for all your projects.

Testimonials.title: Client Success Stories
Testimonials.subtitle: Real developers building with Adowise
Testimonials.client1_content: Adowise helped us develop a custom trading analytics platform. Their dedication and expertise exceeded our expectations.
Testimonials.client2_content: Transformative for our wholesale platform. Their SaaS solution integrated advanced analytics seamlessly.
Testimonials.client3_content: Helped develop our travel dashboard solution. Delivered high-quality work that exceeded expectations.
Testimonials.client4_content: Production-ready Next.js boilerplate accelerated our timeline. Clean, maintainable codebase.
Testimonials.client5_content: Mobile-first design system perfect for scaling. Saved significant development time.

Founders.title: Meet Our Founders
Founders.founder1_bio: Mohd Altaf is a visionary leader with over 6 years of experience in SaaS and web technologies. He focuses on building scalable and user-friendly platforms.
Founders.founder2_bio: Mohd Aftab is a tech enthusiast and full-stack developer. He leads the product and engineering teams ensuring top-notch quality and innovation.

Trends.header_title: Future Trends & Global Innovation We Lead
Trends.header_subtitle: At Adowise, we don't just follow trends; we define them. Explore the future with us.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our services and processes.
FAQ.q1: How long does it take to build a website?
FAQ.a1: A basic website takes 3-5 days, while a full business site takes 5-7 days. Custom enterprise solutions usually take 7-10 working days.
FAQ.q2: Do you provide hosting and domain?
FAQ.a2: Yes, our high-tier plans include domain purchase and setup. We also handle deployment and can guide you on the best hosting providers.
FAQ.a3: Absolutely. We use Next.js for server-side rendering (SSR), ensuring your site is lightning fast and perfectly crawlable by search engines.
FAQ.q4: Can I update the content myself?
FAQ.a4: Yes, our Business and Enterprise plans come with an easy-to-use Admin Panel/CMS so you can update text, images, and blog posts yourself.
FAQ.a5: We provide 24/7 premium support and monthly maintenance to ensure your platform runs smoothly as your business scales.

Footer.brand_desc: Building modern digital experiences with high-quality design, clean code, and meaningful user experiences.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Adowise collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you use our website and services.
Privacy.definitions_desc: Words with capitalized initial letters have meanings defined under the following conditions. The definitions below apply whether they appear in singular or plural.
Privacy.collection_title: Collecting and Using Your Personal Data
Privacy.personal_data_desc: We may ask you to provide certain information that can be used to contact or identify you, including your name, email, and project details.
Privacy.usage_data_desc: Usage Data is collected automatically and may include your IP address, browser type, and diagnostic data.
Privacy.cookies_desc: We use cookies to improve your experience. Critically, we use third-party services like Google AdSense.
Privacy.adsense_desc: Google, as a third-party vendor, uses cookies to serve ads on our site. Google's use of the advertising cookie enables it and its partners to serve ads to our users based on their visit to our sites or other sites on the Internet.
Privacy.opt_out_desc: Users may opt out of personalized advertising by visiting Ads Settings.
Privacy.contact_desc: If you have questions about this policy, contact us at adowise.info@gmail.com
